content:
From 00000721e65322e109063a37ba495557bc5423da Mon Sep 17 00:00:00 2001
From: randymcmillan <randy.lee.mcmillan@gmail.com>
Date: Fri, 15 Sep 2023 16:41:39 -0400
Subject: [PATCH] 2097/711299/807868/03/000b72c6/date +%s

---
 patch.demo.sh | 2 +-
 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 1 deletion(-)

diff --git a/patch.demo.sh b/patch.demo.sh
index 5cabe22..8a848e5 100755
--- a/patch.demo.sh
+++ b/patch.demo.sh
@@ -38,7 +38,7 @@ for td in .gnostr/ ; do
         for f in $PATCHES; do
 
             git apply --allow-empty  <(cat $f)
-            gnostr-legit . -p 00000 -m "$(echo date +%s)"
+            gnostr-legit . -p 00000 -m "$(echo date +%s)" | gnostr-relays
 
         done
     done
--
libgit2 1.6.4
